productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Formal Shoe
description: Look stylish in these black leather shoes from red tape. These dressy shoes are designed for comfort and look great when teamed with pants and shirts for a formal look.Upper High quality leather upper for comfort and durability Clean design with tapered toe box for a very stylish look Elasticated inserts concealed behind the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Leather lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort PU midsoles for lightweight comfort Outsole Outsole with wood finish for better grip Heel for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe dust using a dry, clean clothUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyDo not store in direct sunlight
